zh.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Winter於1325年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特時，他的父親Roger WINTER25歲，母親Elizabeth Hotot30歲。他於1344年與Margaret Burghill在英國武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1350年在他的家鄉享年25歲。

zh-hans.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Winter于1325年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特时，他的父亲Roger WINTER25岁，母亲Elizabeth Hotot30岁。他于1344年与Margaret Burghill在英国武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1350年在他的家乡享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: Winter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old English) personal name Winter (Old English Wintra), originally a nickname from the word for ‘winter’ and perhaps still a nickname (see 2 below) in the period of surname formation.
English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English winter, a variant of Middle English, Anglo-Norman French viniter, vinter ‘wine merchant’.
Irish: Anglicized form (part translation) of Gaelic Mac Giolla-Gheimhridh ‘son of the lad of winter’, from geimhreadh ‘winter’. This name is also Anglicized McAlivery.

variants.name: Winters
meanings: Dutch and German: patronymic from   Winter  .
English: variant of Winter , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Mac Giolla Gheimhridh ‘son of the lad of winter’, from geimhreadh ‘winter’. Compare Winter 4.

variants.name: Winther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Niels, Aksel, Anders, Bent, Jorgen, Lars, Nels, Sven.  German Gerhardt, Kurt, Otto.
German, Danish, and Swedish: variant of   Winter  .

variants.name: Winterberg
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called with Middle High German winter ‘winter’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name composed of German Winter + Berg ‘mountain, hill’.

variants.name: Winterman
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex): occupational name or status name denoting a servant of a man named   Winter   1.
English (Kent and Middlesex): alternatively, perhaps a nickname denoting a person with a cold, wintry appearance or disposition.

English (Kent and Middlesex): occasionally perhaps an occupational name for a wine merchant or a wine merchant's servant, from a variant of Middle English and Anglo-Norman French viniter, vinter ‘wine merchant’ (modern English vintner) + man ‘man’.

variants.name: De Winter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Urbain, Marcel.
Dutch; Flemish (also Dewinter): variant of Winter + definite article de, particularly as a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or tavern named with the season.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Winter was born in 1325, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger WINTER, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Hotot, was 30. He married Margaret Burghill in 1344, in Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1350, in his hometown, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Winter est né en 1325, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger WINTER, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hotot, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Burghill en 1344, à Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1350, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Winter 1325 in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger WINTER 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hotot 30. Er hat 1344 in Worcestershire, England Margaret Burghill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1350 im Alter von 25 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Winter è nato il nel 1325 nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger WINTER, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hotot, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Burghill nel 1344, nel Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1350, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.Wych, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイア
ja.Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスター
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Winterが1325年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで生まれた時，父Roger WINTERは25歳，母Elizabeth Hototは30歳であった。1344年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでMargaret Burghillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1350年に故郷で25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Winter(이)가 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger WINTER(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hotot(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1344년 영국 워스스터실르에서 Margaret Burghill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1350년 그의 고향에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Winter nasceu em 1325, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger WINTER, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hotot, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Burghill em 1344, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1350, em sua cidade natal, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Winter родился в 1325 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger WINTER было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hotot, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Burghill в 1344 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1350 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Winter nació en 1325, en Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger WINTER, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hotot, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Burghill en 1344, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1350, en su pueblo, a la edad de 25 años.
